title: AuditEvent
description: Immutable ledger entry recorded from every plane. Closed at the envelope level; payload interior is intentionally open for forward-compatible per-action fields.
$comment: compat_class: closed (root additionalProperties:false; payload sub-object additionalProperties intentionally left unset/open — see 'payload' property $comment). Authority: approved plan §2 domain row 6 (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2, §5); docs/architecture/contract-catalog.md P0 table 'AuditEvent' row (Owner audit-ledger, Idempotency key 'event hash (chain)', Sensitivity 'internal+actor PII 최소화', Retention 'contractual, immutable role; payload PII/secret 금지'); ADR-0015 (docs/decisions/ADR-0015-canonical-error-model.md) 'AuditEvent 에러 기록 범위' — error path records error_code + trace_id ONLY, never stack traces or raw content, hence error_code here is a top-level opaque-pattern field rather than an embedded error-detail object. event_hash chain semantics (how prev_event_hash forms a verifiable chain) are explicitly deferred to W2A (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §5 'domain/audit-event' row '체인 의미론 W2A').

event_hash.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 6 field list; contract-catalog.md idempotency key 'event hash (chain)'. Opaque value in W1 — chain-linkage semantics (how it is derived from prev_event_hash + payload) are W2A (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §5 domain/audit-event row).

prev_event_hash.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 6 field list — genesis event uses null (chain head has no predecessor). anyOf[null, sha256_ref] form is chosen deliberately and pre-included NOW (rather than added as a later type-widening major) specifically to avoid a future closed-class breaking change when the chain semantics land in W2A (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 6 '$comment top' instruction).

action.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 6 field list — 3-4 dot-segment lowercase_snake action identifier ending in a version suffix (e.g. 'plan.contract.approved.v1', 'patch.unit.completed.v1'), matching the event topic naming convention used across k3s §4.2 message names and the events/ catalog.

recorded_at.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 6 field list.

scope.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 6 field list — Ruling R9 (Security MUST-FIX #1, docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §1.1): 'AuditEvent scope discriminator(if/then 3-분기 미러)' — this field is the R9-1 discriminator; see the allOf conditionals below that mirror the envelope's tenant/system split (ADR-0013 rev.2 tenant 분기 run_id required amendment applies the analogous pattern at the envelope layer).

trace_id.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 6 field list — identical 32-hex W3C trace context format as common/problem-detail/v1 trace_id and the event envelope, the 3-way correlation key per ADR-0015.

payload.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 6 field list — 'payload interior open' by explicit instruction: additionalProperties intentionally left unset here (unlike every other object in this file) so that per-action payload shapes are NOT constrained by this schema. PII/secret exclusion from payload is a RUNTIME gate + permanent negative-fixture obligation, not schema-enforceable content inspection (ADR-0015:64 — 'AuditEvent 에러 기록 범위: error_code + trace_id만 기록한다'; error path payloads must carry only error_code/trace_id, never raw diagnostic content, mirroring common/error-detail's stack-trace prohibition).

tenant_id.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 6 field list, optional at the property level — required conditionally per scope via the allOf block below (R9-1).

run_id.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 6 field list, optional at the property level — forbidden for scope=system per the allOf block below (R9-1).

actor_id.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 6 field list, optional — contract-catalog.md 'actor PII 최소화': ledger carries only actor_id, identity mapping is stored separately.

error_code.$comment: docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2 domain row 6 field list, optional — ADR-0015 taxonomy pattern, identical to common/error-detail.error_code and common/problem-detail.error_code. ADR-0015:64 'AuditEvent 에러 기록 범위' — error_code + trace_id is the entire error footprint permitted at this layer; no embedded error-detail/summary object here.

allOf.$comment: Ruling R9-1 branch 1: scope=tenant requires tenant_id (mirrors the envelope tenant-scope pattern, ADR-0013 rev.2 amendment).

Ruling R9-1 branch 2 (envelope mirror, 3-way discriminator completed): scope=system forbids BOTH tenant_id and run_id — a system-scoped event cannot carry tenant- or run-scoped correlation fields, closing the leak path Security MUST-FIX #1 identified.
